title: rc versions crash the comparator/status/next_version_ok
impact: next_version_ok(x, '<rc>') raises ValueError; status(rc) -> unknown; parse_our_version(rc) -> None. parse_describe EMITS rc (this session) but the comparator cannot consume it - a self-inconsistency. release-review Section 6 next-version gate would crash post-publish if an rc is compared.
recommended_action: Extend _OURS_RE/parse_our_version + _sort_key to understand rcN ordering; guard next_version_ok against unparseable published

title: Term(<bool>) passes bool where stream expected (latent --no-color crash + real type errors)
impact: Term(plan.no_color) sets self.stream=True under --no-color; dormant because those sites only call .colorize(), but any future .line()/.status() there crashes; also the 8 real pyright errors that have dogged the session.
recommended_action: Change the 8 sites to Term(color=False if no_color else None) (the idiom already used at engine.py:1977 + cli.py:814)
validation: pyright/pytest green; Term stream never bool

title: packaging/dev-leak gate self-skips in CI (no build installed)
impact: test_packaging self-skips unless 'build' is installed; the unittest job does not install build, and the wheel job does not run the leak assertions -> AC-11 (ship-vs-dev gate) may run in NO ci job, contradicting the file's own comment.
recommended_action: Install build in the unittest job OR run python -m unittest tests.test_packaging in the wheel job
validation: packaging test executes (not skipped) in CI

title: ARCHITECTURE shim count + workflow tree stale
impact: Says '16' shims (actual 18); file tree omits plan-review-long/ and verify-execution/ (lists 15 of 17 workflow dirs).
recommended_action: Update count 16->18; add the two missing workflow dirs to the tree

title: README core-workflow count + enumeration stale
impact: Prose says 'thirteen core workflows'/'14 rows' but the table has 16 rows and drops release-review-plan, plan-review-long, verify-execution from the :116 enumeration.
recommended_action: Correct the count and add the three missing commands to the enumeration

title: older executed plans use uppercase Status: EXECUTED (pre-D52 vocab)
impact: ~18 older executed plans use 'Status: EXECUTED (...)' vs the current lowercase 'executed' (D52). Correctly located; cosmetic vocabulary drift. Append-only history (P4) argues against rewriting.
recommended_action: Leave as-is (P4 history); note in decisions

title: discovery._scan_children has no symlink-cycle guard
impact: recursive scan follows symlinks with no visited-set/depth cap; a symlink cycle under a search root could RecursionError. User-controlled (not adversarial).
recommended_action: Add a resolved-path visited set or os.walk(followlinks=False)

title: (duplicate of S2-B1 from the packaging lane)
pyproject project.urls thin (no Issues/Changelog)
impact: Only Homepage+Repository (same URL); missing Issues/Changelog links for the PyPI sidebar.

title: deprecated License classifier alongside SPDX expression
impact: PEP 639: License:: classifier deprecated when License-Expression present; stricter toolchains warn.
recommended_action: Drop the License:: OSI classifier; keep SPDX license + license-files

title: roadmaps file missing -NN- segment + no roadmaps README
impact: The one roadmaps file lacks the -NN- per-minute segment the README convention asserts; roadmaps/ has no bucket README (all other buckets do). File is untracked.
recommended_action: Rename file to add -NN-; optionally add roadmaps README
